storyline: From agent idea to governed, evaluated, audited control-plane decision before production.

segments.title: Problem setup
segments.talk_track: Enterprises are moving toward task-specific agents, but production control requires governance, policy, evaluation, audit, and approval.

segments.title: Public site orientation
segments.talk_track: Show the landing page and explain that this is not a chatbot framework.

segments.title: Interactive procurement scenario
segments.talk_track: Walk through procurement intake, governance, policy, runtime, model safety, and audit signals.

segments.title: Control-plane evidence
segments.talk_track: Show benchmark, smoke checks, release evidence, and safety boundaries.

segments.title: Open-source adoption path
segments.talk_track: Show contributor docs, API catalog, and community intake.

segments.title: Boundary statement and close
segments.talk_track: Clarify that live providers, live connectors, raw secrets, and production IAM remain disabled.

success_criteria: Viewer sees concrete procurement demo path.
Viewer does not assume production live execution is enabled.
